title: iberis ciliata subsp. welwitschii
intro: Iberis ciliata subsp. welwitschii, also known as the Welwitch's Cress, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
